name: io.github.ertad-family/liquid
title: Liquid
description: Connect your agent to any HTTP API on the fly — discover, map, and fetch typed data.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI (or compatible) API key for discovery

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL, e.g. local Ollama/vLLM
